oneliner: Bounty program rewarding reports of grant misuse

oneliner: Running the oversight-committee election; voting opens July 9

oneliner: Hiring leadership and negotiating Entropy's 10M ARB performance milestones

name: DRIP incentive program
oneliner: DeFi rewards program extended to July 2027; 63.7M ARB left

oneliner: Executes the DAO's treasury investments on the council's behalf

oneliner: Public data site tracking delegates, elections and proposals

oneliner: Finishing transfer of the misuse-bounty program to OpCo

oneliner: Replace auction-based transaction ordering with priority gas fees

oneliner: Next protocol upgrade shipping after testnet bug fixes

oneliner: About $47M of treasury invested in real-world assets

oneliner: Elected committee reviewing and approving OpCo spending and hires
